nasb.text: Now he despised the oath by breaking the covenant, and behold, he pledged his allegiance, yet did all these things; he shall not escape.’ ”

esv.text: He despised the oath in breaking the covenant, and behold, he gave his hand and did all these things; he shall not escape.

cnv.text: 他藐視誓言，背棄條約；他已宣誓效忠，卻又行了這一切事，所以他必不能逃脫。

ccb.text: 他起誓降服，却弃约背誓，所以绝不能逃避后果。
